cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently highlight the company's commitment to work-life balance and flexible scheduling as a primary driver of satisfaction.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff appreciate the competitive compensation, health insurance, and extensive office amenities provided by the company.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Many employees value the opportunity to work on cutting-edge technology and engage with diverse, global teams.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: A people-centered culture and supportive coworkers contribute to a sense of belonging and collaborative spirit.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees express satisfaction with the company's integrity and focus on sustainable, long-term strategy.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of the workforce reports inflexibility and challenges in balancing personal responsibilities with job demands.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: High-pressure roles, such as those in DevOps, report stress from on-call rotations and concerns regarding compensation levels.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees note a lack of clear advancement paths and feel that their contributions are sometimes overlooked by leadership.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff feel isolated due to remote work dynamics or report a culture of internal competition rather than collaboration.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Concerns regarding management bias, office politics, and the handling of performance reviews are cited as sources of frustration.
